name: Peoplelogic
description: Align your team with OKRs, inspire growth with feedback and praise, effortless surveys and performance reviews, and effective 1:1s. Learn more about Peoplelogic

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: 1. Dedicated team that helps to implement product within organization uder extremely short timing as per request. Avaliability for all the questions and full support alogn the way. 2. Flexibility anf agility to meet customer's needs and adjust the system as per business needs. 3. OKR block is done perfectly to serve the business need. 4. 360 Review assessment block enables to cover employees performance area in one place along with OKR. 5. Well designed user experience - UI/UX that is appreciated by emplloyees.
reviews.review_cons: Product is under the stage of development and would be suitable for small/medium businesses like us, it could be still not ready to take heavy and more demanding requests at this stage in case of large corporations within diverse people processes.

reviews.review_title: Its one among the best for Scalled up OKR implementation, with a few catches
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_description: Overall the software was really good. Help keep the different teams in alignment. But surprisingly, we did a similar implementation using Confluence OKR sheet and it worked fine.
reviews.review_pros: We reviewed a lot of software and I guess, demoed about 3 of them. Plai was around the most intuitive one. Setting it up is easy, and also user friendly. Thus anyone who uses the software once can get a good sense of how OKR's work and how their team objectives align with the bigger company goals.
reviews.review_cons: There was one thing which was an absolute deal-breaker. We wanted slack integration. Plai did provide it at the time (around 6 months ago) but it didn't work. We could not retrieve our objectives using the slack bot and a quick search on the internet revealed that we were not alone. The faulty slack bot made us decide not to proceed with the purchase.

reviews.review_title: Good for people team focussed OKRs
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_pros: It has a lot of features to help with the people side of OKRs
reviews.review_cons: Didn't quite have what we needed from a performance measurement point of view, visuals for the progress of multiple teams vs where they were expecting to be are minimal and we found excel easier

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
reviews.review_description: It greatly facilitated my performance and the organization of my goals. In the past, I had to make do with spreadsheets that were poorly optimized. Plai gave me the ability to no longer worry about these spreadsheets and revisit this information during or after each period and each accomplished objective.
reviews.review_pros: No matter the period of your team's objective, you can easily distribute goals, dates, assignees and check the progress of the objective as the project takes place. The application is very intuitive, not requiring detailed explanations of how it works.
reviews.review_cons: I don't like the lack of integration with some software that is used especially at work, however it's not something that gets in the way of the experience

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
reviews.review_description: The software brought more productivity to the team's daily life, mainly due to the possibility of better organizing, sharing and delegating demands among colleagues, in an easy and efficient way, which for me, is what makes Plai stand out in the market.
reviews.review_pros: The software allows an easy organization and identification of objectives and goals, and the delegation of activities among users.
reviews.review_cons: Unfortunately, the software still does not guarantee the integration with some software from other vendors, which causes some discomfort in daily activities, but it is nothing that has a great impact on productivity.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: This tool is very simple to use. Setting OKRs can be very useful for a company and the fact that you can start using it for free is amazing.
reviews.review_cons: Until today, there was no mobile app. Adding due dates to tasks and having reminders would be great.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: Plai gives you the opportunity to set and monitor OKR's with visibility and transparency.
reviews.review_cons: This is a great tool by itself to monitor the internal actions of your company, although objectives could sometimes require the participation of a guest company/employees. Maybe implementing guests' accounts will be great.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
reviews.review_description: The software helped me take notes on employee performances. I have check ins with workers and give them feedback. During our next meeting, I know how to evaluate employees.
reviews.review_pros: Their software is easy to use and an intuitive UI. No need to read many knowledge base articles or videos on the system.
reviews.review_cons: I found the software worked well. I wished they added a training manual software.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
reviews.review_pros: I love that Plai is so easy to use. I can check with my team's goals on one page!
reviews.review_cons: It might be a bit slow at times... Gladly, it is the only negative I can find.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: Service gives U the great UX. It`s easy-to-use and to understand for all new team members
reviews.review_cons: Everything is fine for now. There is nothing worth changing

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_description: A refreshingly intuitive and user-friendly program, Plai makes the task one that is done quickly and efficiently.
reviews.review_pros: While implementation is currently on hold due to internal circumstances, setting up our company with the "free trial" proved to us how intuitive and knowledgeable this program software truly is. Easy to use, exceptional templates and a system that flows with one's thinking has won our team on the exceptional quality of Plai and the many, many services this software can perform.
reviews.review_cons: That this initiative is currently on hold is frustrating, because those of us who have studied and implemented Plai for use with our company understand the benefits it has to offer to us!

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: Plai makes managing numbers sexy. OKRs used to be in a spreadsheet, but not after discovering Plai. Highly recommended.
reviews.review_cons: There's a lot of features which requires 10 minutes of playing around before you understand how to use the product.

reviews.review_title: Managing team expectations are hard.. not with Plai
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_description: We are impressed with the tool. We will soon make a decision to roll out to the entire company
reviews.review_pros: Our team is distributed across geography and it is not that easy to manage the expectations of management from the team. Plai kind of streamlines, keeps the goal in check.
reviews.review_cons: Few features might get repetitive with other collaboration software.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
reviews.review_description: Great with respect to OKR management.
reviews.review_pros: OKRs simplified, clear UI, birds-eye view of entire department's OKR. Keeps conversations focused in our weekly OKR meetings
reviews.review_cons: I haven't been able to use the PDP and 1:1 effectively. Not sure why, but it hasn't caught on.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years
reviews.review_pros: Nice Platform and highly recommended user-friendly

reviews.review_title: Plai boosted user engagement by multiples
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_pros: Incredibly easy to use and users took to it immediately.
reviews.review_cons: Would like more customization over how the Slack integration updates look.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: I have had a great experience, easy to use, works great for our company and can't wait for even more features to use
reviews.review_pros: Easy to use, great customer service. Works great for a company like us in Fin-Tech
reviews.review_cons: Just missing the 1:1 scheduling feature and setting up reoccurring 1:1 for team members

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: it's easy to view the progress made in each objective that is selected
reviews.review_cons: It was hard for me to get the necessary autorization to edit the data needed

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_description: Plai is very easy to use and lovely screen
reviews.review_pros: Great and easy to make your goals Plai help us to view our objective ever
reviews.review_cons: I don’t found nothing that I don’t like in this

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: Great UX & UI, easy to use, very relevant
reviews.review_cons: I'm only use the basic feature (free). for now i'm very happy to using it
